item.title: About
item.description: ~$ whoami I’m a 25 year old guy. I’ve worked in the IT sector for more than 6 years and counting. ~$ experience My experience includes technical support, netsec and at present I work as a security analyst. ~$ certs eLearnSecurity Certified Threat Hunting Professional (eCTHPv2) eLearnSecurity Juniour Penetration Tester (eJPT) AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (SAA-C03) AWS Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C01) CompTIA Security+ (SY0-601) Palo Alto Networks Certified Security Administrator (PCNSA)
